sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 33

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 33:1
items.html:
(to the question) He'arat HaGevurot [illumination of the Gevurot]
Before the Gevurot [judgments] have received their completeness — that is, their first three [GaR] — they are considered only an illumination of the Gevurot, and not their essence. (p. 743, Item 12)
